query: SELECT cwm.*, cws.name FROM consumable_weekly_movements cwm LEFT JOIN consumables_with_space cws ON cwm.consumableId = cws.id WHERE cws.name = 'Arroz' ORDER BY cwm.weekStartDate DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user r9CVoJ25nh9Ssfd.root --database Ztp8T7Vpr2FQpGULvKFpsw --execute SELECT cwm.*, cws.name FROM consumable_weekly_movements cwm LEFT JOIN consumables_with_space cws ON cwm.consumableId = cws.id WHERE cws.name = 'Arroz' ORDER BY cwm.weekStartDate DESC LIMIT 5;
